button.name: action_open_submit_wizard
button.invisible: state not in ('demandeur', 'selection_candidats', 'candidat_retenu') or (state in ('demandeur', 'selection_candidats', 'candidat_retenu') and current_user_can_act_as_demandeur == False)

label.string: CONTENU DU POSTE ET DESCRIPTIF DES TACHES PRINCIPALES

field.name: interview_datetime
field.readonly: (parent.step != 'rh_schedule_interview' or parent.current_user_is_rh == False or is_refused_line == True)

field.name: retenu_final
field.readonly: (parent.step != 'demandeur_final_choice' or parent.current_user_can_act_as_demandeur == False or is_refused_line == True)

field.name: rh_validation
field.readonly: (parent.step != 'rh_validate_final' or parent.current_user_is_rh == False or is_refused_line == True)

field.name: fa_date_entretien
field.readonly: (parent_step != 'demandeur_final_choice' or parent_user_can_act_as_demandeur == False or is_refused_line == True)

field.readonly: (parent_step != 'demandeur_final_choice' or parent_user_can_act_as_demandeur == False or is_refused_line == True)

button.name: action_save_candidate_popup
button.invisible: (parent_step != 'demandeur_final_choice' or parent_user_can_act_as_demandeur == False or is_refused_line == True)

field.name: rhfa_date_entretien
field.readonly: (parent_step != 'rh_validate_final' or parent_user_is_rh == False or is_refused_line == True)

button.name: action_save_candidate_popup
button.invisible: (parent_step != 'rh_validate_final' or parent_user_is_rh == False or is_refused_line == True)

group.string: Principales missions et réalisations accomplies durant la période de probation

field.name: interview_datetime
field.readonly: (parent_step != 'rh_schedule_interview' or parent_user_is_rh == False or is_refused_line == True)

field.name: retenu_final
field.readonly: (parent_step != 'demandeur_final_choice' or parent_user_can_act_as_demandeur == False or is_refused_line == True)

field.name: rh_validation
field.readonly: (parent_step != 'rh_validate_final' or parent_user_is_rh == False or is_refused_line == True)

field.name: offre_candidat_nom
field.readonly: parent_state != 'offre_candidat' or parent_user_is_rh == False or deliberation_decision != 'oui'

field.name: offre_candidat_file
field.readonly: parent_state != 'offre_candidat' or parent_user_is_rh == False or deliberation_decision != 'oui'

field.name: offre_decision
field.readonly: parent_state != 'offre_en_cours' or parent_user_is_rh == False or deliberation_decision != 'oui'

field.name: validation_n1_essai
field.readonly: (demande_state != 'periode_essai_n1' or current_user_is_manager == False or is_trial_history == True)

field.name: validation_rh_essai
field.readonly: (demande_state != 'periode_essai_rh' or current_user_is_rh == False or is_trial_history == True)

field.name: validation_direction_generale
field.readonly: (demande_state != 'direction_generale' or current_user_is_md == False or is_trial_history == True)

field.name: validation_deliberation_finale
field.readonly: (demande_state != 'deliberation_finale' or current_user_is_rh == False or is_trial_history == True)

field.name: interview_datetime
field.readonly: (parent.step != 'rh_schedule_interview' or parent.current_user_is_rh == False or is_refused_line == True)

field.name: retenu_final
field.readonly: (parent.step != 'demandeur_final_choice' or parent.current_user_can_act_as_demandeur == False or is_refused_line == True)

field.name: rh_validation
field.readonly: (parent.step != 'rh_validate_final' or parent.current_user_is_rh == False or is_refused_line == True)

field.name: offre_candidat_nom
field.readonly: parent.state != 'offre_candidat' or parent.current_user_is_rh == False or deliberation_decision != 'oui'

field.name: offre_candidat_file
field.readonly: parent.state != 'offre_candidat' or parent.current_user_is_rh == False or deliberation_decision != 'oui'

field.name: offre_decision
field.readonly: parent.state != 'offre_en_cours' or parent.current_user_is_rh == False or deliberation_decision != 'oui'

field.name: hiring_date
field.readonly: (parent.step != 'rh_hiring_date' or parent.current_user_is_rh == False or is_refused_line == True)

field.name: validation_n1_essai
field.readonly: (demande_state != 'periode_essai_n1' or current_user_is_manager == False or is_trial_history == True)

field.name: validation_rh_essai
field.readonly: (demande_state != 'periode_essai_rh' or current_user_is_rh == False or is_trial_history == True)

field.name: validation_direction_generale
field.readonly: (demande_state != 'direction_generale' or current_user_is_md == False or is_trial_history == True)

field.name: validation_deliberation_finale
field.readonly: (demande_state != 'deliberation_finale' or current_user_is_rh == False or is_trial_history == True)
